data.content: Implementation complete on branch worktree-foolery-7e6d-terminal-rehydration (commit f0ec2a34). Two changes: (1) Removed early-return guard in useRehydrateTerminals that skipped listSessions() when local terminals were empty — now always fetches backend sessions so new browser instances discover active work. (2) Updated computeRehydrate to set panelOpen:true, panelMinimized:false when orphan running sessions are found, so the panel auto-opens. Added 4 new tests covering panel auto-open on orphan discovery, no-op when no orphans, no-op for completed orphans, and unminimize behavior. All quality gates pass: lint clean, tsc clean, 2429 tests passing, build succeeds.
